query: What are the top AI news headlines today? Include sources.
textResponse:
I don’t have live web access in this chat, so I can’t reliably tell you **today’s** top AI headlines without risking stale or made-up news.

Here are two good options:

1. **I can give you a fast, trustworthy list of the best sources to check right now**, or  
2. **If you paste links/headlines from today**, I can summarize them into a clean “top AI news” briefing.

### Best sources for today’s AI headlines
- **Reuters Technology / AI** — https://www.reuters.com/technology/  
- **Bloomberg Technology / AI** — https://www.bloomberg.com/technology  
- **The Verge AI** — https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence  
- **TechCrunch AI** — https://techcrunch.com/category/artificial-intelligence/  
- **MIT Technology Review – AI** — https://www.technologyreview.com/topic/artificial-intelligence/  
- **Financial Times Technology** — https://www.ft.com/technology  
- **The Information** — https://www.theinformation.com/  
- **Semafor Tech** — https://www.semafor.com/tech  
- **OpenAI News** — https://openai.com/news  
- **Google DeepMind Blog** — https://deepmind.google/discover/blog/  
- **Anthropic News** — https://www.anthropic.com/news  
- **NVIDIA Blog / AI** — https://blogs.nvidia.com/  

### If you want, I can still help right now
Paste:
- 5–10 article links, or
- screenshots/headlines, or
- the output of a Google News search for “AI”

and I’ll turn it into:
- **Top headlines**
- **1-line summary of each**
- **Why it matters**
- **Sources**
- optional **bullish / bearish / policy / product** categorization

### Quick way to find them yourself
Search on Google News:
- **site:reuters.com AI**
- **site:techcrunch.com AI**
- **site:theverge.com AI**
- or just **AI news today**

If you want, I can also provide a **sample AI news briefing format** you can reuse every day.
